summary: HealthMate MVP fully tested end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass (root, symptoms list, symptom check success/empty-400/no-match, exercises list, exercise by id + 404, workout log+list persistence, chat send + history with Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key). Frontend: all 4 tabs render, Home hero + 3 feature cards navigate correctly, Symptoms screen search/chips/analyze/results-modal/close works, Fitness screen lists 3 exercises, workout counter increments (0→3), start/pause toggle works, finish saves & returns to list, Chat screen shows welcome bubble + suggestion chips, send produces user bubble + AI reply from MediBot.

issues: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' emitted by react-native-web (non-blocking, likely from a library). Not a blocker.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 387 uses `logger` inside chat_send; logger is defined at module-bottom (line 423). Works because it's resolved at call time, but style-wise move the logging setup to the top of the file for clarity.

Frontend .env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Consistent with Expo conventions and constants/theme.ts — no action needed, but review_request mentioned EXPO_BACKEND_URL which does not exist; EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is correctly used throughout.
No input length validation on chat message; consider capping to avoid large LLM payloads (not a bug, just hardening).
Workout listing converts isoformat string back to datetime on every read; consider storing as native Date in Mongo to avoid round-trips.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed needed. Test creates one TEST_Push-Up workout and one chat session (test-session-<uuid>); Mongo docs remain but are prefixed/unique and harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env for both backend + frontend testing (https://fitness-care-hub.preview.emergentagent.com). Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_healthmate_api.py — reuse them. Chat test takes ~3-5s (real LLM call). Fitness workout flow navigates in-screen (no route change) via setSelected state.
